title: Mustardy Flaky Venezuelan Quick-Fix Bake
description: A zesty Venezuelan-inspired bake with a hint of vanilla and a boost from dashi-extract.
instructions: In a medium-sized bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and kosher salt.
Add the cold butter to the dry ingredients and use a pastry blender or your fingers to work it into a crumbly mixture.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and milk (if using).
Stir in the vanilla bean paste and dashi-extract.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until the dough comes together in a shaggy mass.
Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead a few times until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Roll the dough out to a thickness of about 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Cut the dough into 8 equal pieces and place on a parchment-lined baking sheet.
Mix the whole-grain mustard with a pinch of water to create a thin paste, and brush it evenly over the dough pieces.
Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until the pastries are golden brown.
Let cool on a wire rack for 5-10 minutes before serving.
